name: Hanma Technology Group Co.,Ltd.
summary: Hanma Technology Group Co.,Ltd. researches and produces heavy trucks, heavy-duty special vehicles, and components in the People's Republic of China. The company offers heavy-duty vehicle chassis, as well as automobile engines, passenger cars, powertrains, axles, automobile parts, assembly parts, and other products. It also exports its products to approximately 60 countries in Eastern Europe, North Africa, Southeast Asia, South America, and internationally. The company was formerly known as Hualing Xingma Automobile (Group) Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Hanma Technology Group Co.,Ltd. in December 2020. Hanma Technology Group Co.,Ltd. is based in Maanshan, the People's Republic of China.
